content.full_text:
May 8, 1990

Jill Stecher, Counsel
Legal Division
Fair Political Practices Committee
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804

Re: Confirmation of Telephone Advice

Dear Ms. Stecher:

This letter is sent to request written confirmation of telephone advice your provided this office last week.

We asked whether a local candidate's committee could make contributions to a federal candidate. You indicated that this would not be a permissible use of campaign funds pursuant to Government Code §§ 85202(b) and 85801.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Very truly yours,

OLSON CONNELLY, HAGEL, FONG & LEIDIGH

DIANE M. FISHBURN

DMF:sk
